hindi: नमस्ते रुद्र मन्यव उतो त इषवे नमः।
english: Salutations to your anger O Rudra, and salutations to your arrow
roman: Namaste Rudra manyava uto ta ishave namah

hindi: नमस्ते अस्तु धन्वने बाहुभ्यामुत ते नमः॥
english: Salutations to your bow, salutations to your two arms
roman: Namaste astu dhanvane bahubhyam uta te namah

hindi: या त इषुः शिवतमा शिवं बभूव ते धनुः।
english: Your arrow which is most auspicious — your bow has become auspicious
roman: Ya ta ishah shivataama shivam babhuvate dhanuh

hindi: शिवा शरव्या या तव तया नो रुद्र मृडय॥
english: Auspicious is your quiver as well — with that O Rudra be gracious to us
roman: Shiva sharavya ya tava taya no Rudra mridaya

english: Salutations to you O blessed one, O Vishweshwara, O Mahadeva
To the three-eyed, destroyer of Tripura, fire of the three times

hindi: ते नो रुद्र महागुरो, रक्ष त्वं भक्तवत्सल।
english: O great Guru Rudra, protect us, O affectionate to devotees
roman: Te no Rudra Mahaguro Raksha tvam bhakta vatsala

hindi: ॐ नमः शिवाय शान्ताय, सर्वजगद्धिताय च॥
english: Om, salutations to the peaceful Shiva, the benefactor of all the world
roman: Om namah Shivaya shantaya sarva jagad hitaya cha
